nfrs.description: <Observable quality goal in business terms; no framework/db/tool names; no vague adjectives>

fit_criterion.threshold: <Measurable condition with explicit number/percentage/level — no vague terms>
fit_criterion.environment: <Context: environment type, user group, load level — no specific cloud/db product names>
fit_criterion.period: <When measured: per request / each release / each calendar month / etc.>

nfrs.measurement_method: <How the threshold is observed — optional but strongly recommended>
nfrs.na_reason: <Required when coverage_status = not_applicable — explains WHY, not just asserts NA>
nfrs.deferred_missing_info: <Required when coverage_status = deferred — names exactly what info is missing>
